reviews.review_msg: Excellent prof! Very knowledgeable and he explains concepts/theories very well. Although his class is tough... I have learned so much from his class!

He's not easy, so expect that going in. HOWEVER, if you want to do well in future finance courses, I highly recommend taking Jorge's class. He goes over concepts that others don't, such as swaps, and fully prepares you for 400 level courses. After taking his class, the 400 level stuff I did was simple since I had done it already over and over.

Before I write the final exam, I just want to say he is actually a good prof. Yes his assignments are way tougher than other profs' but they are doable and you learn a lot from them. In the long run you will be thankful to be taught by him...and this is apparently his last term teaching.. what a shame..

You will need to put in effort for this course. He may seem strict at first, but once you get to know him he is very helpful. The final/midterm used questions from tutorials so go to them, and the final was easier than the in-class midterm.
nice and friendly. final exam was easier than the midterm. This is true, use tutorial questions for study.

Good prof. I like how he explained complicated formulas and some stats concepts. The marking was fair. Take home exam is long but we had enough time. The other exams are based on the tutorial questions, so get a copy of the answers.
He is always focusing on his stocks and phd rather than this course.
Worst instructor I've ever met at SFU!!! He is not responsible at all to his students.
Loved his stories, his analogies helped to explain complex financial models. Great course/great prof.
This prof does not give out answer keys to his assignments. making those who didn't do too well on the take home exam or assignment hard to pull up their marks later in the course.
Overall he is a great professor.  His classes are allot of work but you learn so much.  His midterms are fair, and cover the material from tutorials and the problem sets.
Fun and easy course. Lots of examples, in class debates and good looking Italian girls. :) I think Jorge teaches this once a year, but he is really good and his section is easy.

Very smar guy. He focuses on practical stuff so I liked the course. The course website could be improved, but he has clear rules and expectations since the begining. I wish he had more office hours, especially before the lecture! Overall a good prof!

I was a bit afraid to take a course with him because of the reviews that say that he is hard. But he is really good. I learned A LOT! I think he is one of the best profs I've had so far. Clear lecture notes, lots of examples in tutorials, and very fair marking! We even got the full grade distribution before the final!

He's very challenging and smart and we learn a lot, but he could do more to help facilitate our learning. my main complaint is that he NEVER posts assignments ON TIME! So annoying. he posts them 3 or 4 days after he says he would, giving us little time as if we have no life but his class. In class midterm was very reasonable.

Yes, he is good at explaining the material but expects WAYYY too much from us. Take home midterm was wayy too long and time consuming. Always late for class and office hours. Doesn't offer enough help either. Overall a HORRIBLE prof.

Take home assignment is too long and hard!he is always late for class.He cannot finish his tasks on time and he hardly replyed our emails.His office hour is right after class (most time b4 he post the assignment problems).He always sends emails at midnight.
This class is insane! Material is far too intense for 300-level class. Take-Home Midterm extremely long.. Always late, assumes students' understand everything. High expectations. Not happy right now.

most disorganized prof ive seen. typo in everything. late at least 10min EVERY SINGLE CLASS. posts assn late and expect u to finish it on time. he thinks his class is the only class students hav. tak home midterm is ridiculous. extremely time consuming, more thn inclass mt. hes full of himself. too much wkload.4assn,1tak home mt, 1 inclass mt,final

I don't understand why so many people say he is a good prof. I think he is the one who writes these comments.he expects you to do so much without telling/teaching you what to do. Don't ever take any finance course with him, period.
don't take any courses with him unless you love low GPA. materials are not enough to do assignments and exams

Jorge does not give out examples in his lectures. All he does is ramble on about lame jokes. Tutorial questions were useful. His demand from his students was ridiculous. He was teaching far ahead of himself without teaching the foundation to his students first. He favors students and that's probably why he has good reviews on here.

I took 316 with another prof and dropped out of 315 before taking it with him, and I think that he is one of the best finance instructors at SFU. He loves finance and teaching, and his grading is fair. however, he should have two lectures every week instead of one long lecture, and more office hours, that would be easier for students.

he is a good prof. the material is dificult but he explains it very well. I spent a lot of time in office hours and he was always nice and helpful. The guy that says that he gives no examples is wrong! all we did in tutorials was examples, and we got copies of the answers. the exams/assignments are based on tutorial questions, so go to tutorials!

I'm surprised to see that so many people think he's a good prof. He's the worst I've had. He's very cocky, doesn't answer your questions unless he actually likes you as a student, and the questions he gives out as assig/exams are 400 level finance questions. He doesn't give any examples and doesn't teach you how to do questions. I hate him!

I took 315 & 316 with him in the same semester. Demanding coursework, difficult material, but the prof is extremely helpful. Will help you outside of office hours. Sense of humour and charisma, making a boring course actually interesting. No regrets taking both courses with him, but taking them separately is recommended. Favourite Prof of all time!

He is an excelent prof, with a laid back personality and a sense of humor. He explains very well and makes the class interesting, which helps when you're studying some boring topics. He makes you work hard, but you learn A LOT! and his marking is very fair. From my experience with other finance profs, I can say that I'm glad to have Jorge for 316.

He is very hard.  He makes you work hard, there are 4 assign, 1 take home midterm, 1 in class midterm and a final. He is very smart so he expects his students to be as smart as him.  He doesn't have much office hours.  Worst of all he keeps taking about drinkin and smokin all kind of stuff. He procrastinates all the time and hes full of himself.

Very Hard Prof. Really pushes you, lots and lots of work compared to other profs. Course Requires a lot of time. You do learn a lot and he will help you if you ask but very time consuming. Do NOT take 315 and 316 together with him, it will kill you. If you plan on going into finance its not a bad idea to take the class with him espessially 316.

He has key points which are reflected through the assignments and the take-home midterm. Seems he is pretty smart and enjoys playing in the finance world, but this will be difficult to our beginners. Hope his teaching helps our future finance courses.

Excellent prof! Explains clearly, easy to understand, slides make sense. Assignments are okay, take home midterm is very hard, but you know the material very well after you take it with him. Finance majors: take it with him --> prepares you for 400 level. He's quite funny and lectures aren't boring at all. He's also very fair.

He is very hard in the sense that he really wants you to learn your stuff and not just memorize. You have to put in some hours for any of the courses that you take with him, but at the end its worth it.  He is patient and knows his material very well.  One recommendation do not take Bus 315 and Bus 316 at the same time. YOU WILL DIE.

Awesome instructor! One of the best I have ever had. He is hard but very fair. In all honesty, I didn't even find the course hard, just I need to put some hours into it, like all other finance courses. Also, if he were a little taller, I will totally hit on him....

Amazing lecturer. Always prepared and enthusiastic. Course is not easy, but you actually learn something. During office hours, it's often hard to keep up with his pace but if you ask he repeats himself with patience. He's not much older than us students so he understands where we're coming from. Highly recommended.

I strongly recommend students takimg Bus 316 with Prof. Jorge Cruz Lopez. He teaches his students with great enthusiasm and charisma. Although this couse is not an easy one, you will definitely gain useful knowledge by the end of the course.

Excellent prof! He's passionate about derivatives and succeeds in making the lectures very interesting. I have never seen a prof that is so eager to help students. If you consistently work hard in his class, you can do very well. His lecture material is VERY IMPORTANT for his exams. He makes the class quite challenging but you learn a lot!!!

This instructor is very good. He knows a lot about finance and he is willing to help you all the time. He has an accent, but you can understand everything. The first midterm was hard, but his grading is ok. Overall the class is easy if you read the notes and go to the lectures.

This prof is great!. He's young and funny, and makes things very clear. Midterms are hard but he gives lots of part marks. Some things in bus316 class are very hard, but he will try to explain in many different ways so that students can understand. He will help you with questions if you see him even if he is not in office hours.
